assignments.description: Builds a delete-ready ContactPointAddress from the current Loop_Split_Addresses (PrepopulatedItems) item. Stamps Id onto var_SingleAddress, adds to var_DeleteAddresses. Routes back to Loop_Split_Addresses.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_Delete_Address
assignments.label: Add Address to Delete List

assignments.description: Builds a new ContactPointAddress record from the current Loop_Split_Addresses_New (AddedItems) iteration. Stamps screen field values and ParentId onto var_SingleAddress, then adds var_SingleAddress to var_NewAddresses. Routes back to Loop_Split_Addresses_New.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_New_Address
assignments.label: Build New Address Record

assignments.description: Builds an update-ready ContactPointAddress record from the current Loop_Split_Addresses (PrepopulatedItems) iteration. Copies screen field values onto var_SingleAddress (preserving Id), then adds var_SingleAddress to var_UpdateAddresses. Routes back to Loop_Split_Addresses.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_Update_Address
assignments.label: Build Update Address Record

assignments.description: Increments var_PrimaryCount by 1 when Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses.field_Address_IsPrimary is true. Routes back to Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses.
assignments.name: Assign_Count_Primary_Address
assignments.label: Increment Primary Address Count

assignments.description: Increments var_PrimaryCount by 1 when a newly added address row has the Primary checkbox checked. Routes back to Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses_Added.
assignments.name: Assign_Count_Primary_Address_Added
assignments.label: Increment Primary Address Count (Added)

assignments.description: Resets var_PrimaryCount to 0 before the address primary-validation loop. Routes to Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses.
assignments.name: Assign_Reset_Primary_Count_Address
assignments.label: Reset Primary Count for Address

decisions.description: Checks Loop_Split_Addresses.field_Address_MarkedForDeletion. If true, routes to Assign_Build_Delete_Address. If false, routes to Assign_Build_Update_Address.
decisions.name: Decision_Address_Marked_Delete
decisions.label: Address Marked for Deletion?

decisions.description: Evaluates var_PrimaryCount after Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses and Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses_Added. If greater than 1, routes to Screen_Error_Primary. If zero or one, proceeds to Loop_Split_Addresses.
decisions.name: Decision_Address_Primary_Valid
decisions.label: Address Primary Count Valid?

decisions.description: After deleting addresses, routes to clear Account address fields only if a primary address was deleted. Skips if no deleted address was primary.
decisions.name: Decision_Clear_Address_Account_Fields
decisions.label: Primary Address Deleted?

decisions.description: Checks whether var_DeleteAddresses contains any records. If yes, routes to Screen_Confirm_Delete_Address. If no, routes to Decision_Has_New_Addresses.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_Delete_Addresses
decisions.label: Any Addresses to Delete?

decisions.description: Checks whether var_NewAddresses contains any records. If not empty, routes to Assign_Flag_New_Addresses then Create_New_Addresses. If empty, skips to Decision_Has_Update_Addresses.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_New_Addresses
decisions.label: Any New Addresses to Create?

decisions.description: Checks whether var_UpdateAddresses contains any records. If not empty, routes to Assign_Flag_Update_Addresses then Update_Addresses. If empty, routes to Screen_Success_Address.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_Update_Addresses
decisions.label: Any Addresses to Update?

decisions.description: Checks whether Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses.field_Address_IsPrimary is true. If true, increments var_PrimaryCount. If false, loops to next item.
decisions.name: Decision_Is_Address_Primary
decisions.label: Is Address Primary?

decisions.description: Checks field_Address_IsPrimary on current Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses_Added item. If true, increments var_PrimaryCount. If false, continues to next item.
decisions.name: Decision_Is_Address_Primary_Added
decisions.label: Is Added Address Primary?

Flow.description: Screen subflow called by SMQS_Screen_Manage_ContactPoints when the user selects Address. Manages ContactPointAddress records: edit, add, delete with confirmation. Receives pre-queried collections from the parent. Has its own Error_Screen and Screen_Error_Primary.

formulas.description: Abbreviated month name for the CPA name stamp.
formulas.name: formula_AddressMonthAbbrev

formulas.description: CPA Name convention: [Account Name] Mailing Address [Mon, YYYY]. Used when creating new ContactPointAddress records.
formulas.name: formula_AddressName

formulas.description: Returns "Mailing" for Person Accounts and "Billing" for Business Accounts. Used in address screen labels and success headers.
formulas.name: formula_AddressTypeLabel

Flow.label: SMQS Screen Manage ContactPoints Address Subflow

loops.description: Iterates var_AllAddresses (updated by the AddressesList repeater allItems output) to count how many have IsPrimary = true. After all items, Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses_Added continues the tally.
loops.name: Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses
loops.label: Count Primary Addresses (Existing)

loops.description: Iterates AddressesList.AddedItems to count how many newly added address rows have the Primary checkbox checked. After all added rows, Decision_Address_Primary_Valid evaluates the total count.
loops.name: Loop_Count_Primary_Addresses_Added
loops.label: Count Primary Addresses (Added)

loops.description: Iterates AddressesList.PrepopulatedItems. Routes each item through Decision_Address_Marked_Delete: if Marked_For_Deletion__c is true, adds to var_DeleteAddresses; otherwise builds update record. No DML inside the loop.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Addresses
loops.label: Build Update Addresses from Existing

loops.description: Iterates AddressesList.AddedItems after primary validation passes. For each added row, Assign_Build_New_Address stamps screen field values and ParentId onto var_SingleAddress, then adds var_SingleAddress to var_NewAddresses. Routes to Decision_Has_Delete_Addresses when done.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Addresses_New
loops.label: Build New Addresses from Added

recordCreates.description: Performs a single DML insert for all records in var_NewAddresses. On success, routes to Decision_Has_Update_Addresses. On fault, routes to Error_Screen.
recordCreates.name: Create_New_Addresses
recordCreates.label: Create New Address Records

recordDeletes.description: Permanently deletes all records in var_DeleteAddresses. On success, routes to Decision_Clear_Address_Account_Fields. On fault, routes to Error_Screen.
recordDeletes.name: Delete_Addresses
recordDeletes.label: Delete Addresses

recordUpdates.description: Clears Billing* fields on the Account when the deleted address was primary and the account is a Business Account.
recordUpdates.name: Clear_Billing_Fields
recordUpdates.label: Clear Billing Fields

recordUpdates.description: Clears PersonMailing* fields on the Account when the deleted address was primary and the account is a Person Account.
recordUpdates.name: Clear_PersonMailing_Fields
recordUpdates.label: Clear PersonMailing Fields

recordUpdates.description: Performs a single DML update for all records in var_UpdateAddresses. On success, routes to Screen_Success_Address. On fault, routes to Error_Screen.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Addresses
recordUpdates.label: Update Address Records

screens.description: Fault screen displayed when any DML operation fails. Surfaces the triggering record Id and name, the full fault message, and the current flow stage.
screens.name: Error_Screen
screens.label: Error Screen

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
The screen flow "Manage Contact Points" has failed. Please send this message to your administrator.


Triggering record: {!recordId} - {!var_Account.Name}


Fault Message: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}


Current Stage: {!$Flow.CurrentStage}

screens.description: Confirmation screen shown when var_DeleteAddresses is not empty. Displays records to be permanently deleted and records to be kept. User clicks Confirm Delete to proceed, or Go Back to uncheck marks.
screens.name: Screen_Confirm_Delete_Address
screens.label: Confirm Address Deletion

fields.name: txt_Confirm_Delete_Address_Warning
fields.fieldText: The following addresses will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone. Click "Go Back and Review" to uncheck any that should be kept.

screens.description: Displayed when the user marks more than one record as Primary in the repeater. allowBack is true so the user can return and correct. allowFinish is false so the flow cannot complete in this error state.
screens.name: Screen_Error_Primary
screens.label: Primary Validation Error

fields.name: txt_Error_Primary
fields.fieldText:
Only one record can be marked as Primary.


Please go back and update your selections so that no more than one record has Primary checked.

screens.description: Displays all ContactPointAddress records for this Account in a repeater pre-populated from var_AllAddresses (sorted primary first). Two read-only datatables above show which household members will (var_SyncACRs) and will not (var_NoSyncACRs) receive address syncs. Users can edit or add address rows. On Save, primary validation runs before DML.
screens.name: Screen_Manage_Addresses
screens.label: Manage Addresses

fields.name: txt_SyncYes_Header_Person
fields.fieldText: The primary address will be shared with these household members:

fields.name: txt_SyncYes_Header_Household
fields.fieldText: The household's address will be shared with these household members as their primary address:

value.stringValue: Address will sync to these people

fields.name: txt_SyncAddress_NoSync_Notice_Generic
fields.fieldText: These household members won't be affected by any changes.

value.stringValue: Address sync is off for these contacts

fields.name: txt_SyncAddress_NoSync_Notice
fields.fieldText: Replacing the primary address will not affect the household — address sync is off for this member.

fields.name: txt_Address_Marked_Delete_Above
fields.fieldText: ⚠ This address is marked for deletion.

fields.name: txt_Address_Marked_Delete_Below
fields.fieldText: ⚠ This address is marked for deletion.

screens.description: Confirmation screen displayed after address DML completes successfully. Shows the Account name and tables of created and updated mailing address records.
screens.name: Screen_Success_Address
screens.label: Addresses Updated

fields.name: txt_Success_Address_None
fields.fieldText: No addresses have been created or updated.

fields.name: txt_Success_Address_Created
fields.fieldText: {!formula_AddressTypeLabel} addresses for {!var_Account.Name} have been created.

fields.name: txt_Success_Address_Update
fields.fieldText: {!formula_AddressTypeLabel} addresses for {!var_Account.Name} have been updated.

variables.description: Account Id passed in from the parent flow.
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: Pre-queried Account record. Used for name display in success/error screens.
variables.name: var_Account

variables.description: All ContactPointAddress records for this Account. Pre-queried by parent and passed in. Bound to the AddressesList repeater.
variables.name: var_AllAddresses

variables.description: ContactPointAddress records marked for deletion by the user in the repeater. Built by Assign_Build_Delete_Address during Loop_Split_Addresses. Passed to Delete_Addresses.
variables.name: var_DeleteAddresses

variables.description: Set to true when a deleted address had IsPrimary = true. Used to decide whether to clear Account address fields after deletion.
variables.name: var_HasDeletePrimary

variables.description: The household account name, passed in from the parent. Used in the Household Address Sync section header.
variables.name: var_HouseholdName

variables.description: New ContactPointAddress records (Id is null) built by Loop_Split_Addresses_New. ParentId stamped. Passed to Create_New_Addresses.
variables.name: var_NewAddresses

variables.description: Active ACRs where Sync_Household_Address__c = false. Pre-queried by parent. Displayed in dt_SyncNo.
variables.name: var_NoSyncACRs

variables.description: Count of active ACRs where Sync_Household_Address__c = false. Passed in from parent. Used by visibility rules on sync section headers and dt_SyncNo.
variables.name: var_NoSyncACRs_Count

variables.description: The Person Account's own ACR connecting them to their household. Null for Household/Business accounts. Sync_Household_Address__c drives visibility of the individual no-sync notice.
variables.name: var_PersonACR

variables.description: Counter incremented by primary-counting loops. Reset to 0 by Assign_Reset_Primary_Count_Address before the loop runs. Evaluated by Decision_Address_Primary_Valid — if greater than 1, routes to Screen_Error_Primary.
variables.name: var_PrimaryCount

variables.description: Intermediate single-record variable used by Loop_Split_Addresses and Loop_Split_Addresses_New to stage field values before adding to var_UpdateAddresses or var_NewAddresses.
variables.name: var_SingleAddress

variables.description: Active ACRs where Sync_Household_Address__c = true. Pre-queried by parent. Displayed in dt_SyncYes.
variables.name: var_SyncACRs

variables.description: Count of active ACRs where Sync_Household_Address__c = true. Passed in from parent. Used by visibility rules on sync section headers and dt_SyncYes.
variables.name: var_SyncACRs_Count

variables.description: Existing ContactPointAddress records (Id is not null) built by Loop_Split_Addresses. Passed to Update_Addresses.
variables.name: var_UpdateAddresses
